emails.subject: Formulary Notice — Webb, Marcus | MemberID: BCX-447821055
emails.body_text:
Hello CareIG Intake Team,

I am writing proactively regarding my patient Marcus Webb (DOB: 03/15/1968, Member ID: BCX-447821055) for whom I have recently submitted a referral for home IVIG therapy.

Octagam is my preferred formulation; however, I am aware that it may not appear on all commercial formularies. Should BlueCross Premier not cover Octagam, I authorize substitution of Gammagard Liquid 10% at an adjusted dose of 35 grams IV every 28 days. The dose reduction from the originally ordered 40g reflects the higher bioavailability profile of the Gammagard Liquid 10% formulation and is clinically appropriate for this patient. Please update the case accordingly.

No amendment to the Letter of Medical Necessity is required — it covers IVIG therapy broadly and is not brand-specific.

Please proceed with whichever covered formulation is appropriate for this patient's plan.

Feel free to contact my office at (555) 301-4490 with any questions.

Sincerely,
Dr. Elena Vasquez, MD
Springfield Neurology Associates
(555) 301-4490 | evasquez@springfieldneurology.com
